Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Year categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "[[:en:Category|Category]]" to ""
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8213443)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:New-Category]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{各世紀の科学者}} {{Commons cat multi|8th century scientists}} {{see also|en:Category:8th-century scientists}} {{citation needed|8せいきのしせんかかくしや}} {{translated page|ja|Category:8世紀の科学者|version=86768999}} {{wikidata link|Q8213443}} <!--interwikis--> [[ar:Category:علماء القرن 8]] [[bn:Category:৮ম শতাব্দীর বিজ্ঞানী]] [[co:commons:Category:8th-century scientists]] [[cs:Category:Vědci 8. století]] [[en:Category:8th-century scientists]] [[fa:Category:دانشمندان سده ۸ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Scientifique du VIIIe siècle]] [[ja:Category:8世紀の科学者]] [[ko:Category:8세기 과학자]] [[mk:Category:Научници од 8 век]] [[ru:Category:Учёные VIII века]] [[tr:Category:8. yüzyıl bilim insanları]] [[ur:Category:آٹھویں صدی کے سائنس دان]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
